use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in hero sections or landing pages
Attention-grabbing action buttons in dark-themed interfaces
Interactive product cards and feature highlights
Navigation bar action buttons requiring visual emphasis
Signup, download, or conversion-focused button elements
ai_summary: A visually striking button component featuring an aurora-like gradient glow effect with purple, cyan, and emerald colors. The button has a dark slate background with a glowing gradient border that intensifies on hover. Uses glass-morphism styling with blur effects and opacity transitions to create a modern, premium feel suitable for SaaS and fintech applications.
